/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libinterfaz_servicio_suma__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libinterfaz_servicio_suma__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/interfaz_servicio_suma__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/interfaz_servicio_suma/srv/detail/add_two_ints__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
